understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to reach the goal gem tile ‘+’ while avoiding hazards (primarily spikes), using movement and environmental interactions to create a safe path.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is performed horizontally (left or right), but after each move, gravity automatically carries the player to the next available resting point in the direction of gravity (down or up). Clicks are used to remove breakable (x) tiles to open new paths or fall lines. Hazards like spikes (u/v) instantly end the run if landed on. Undo lets you revert a previous move if a mistake is made. Strategic use of corridor scans and passage detection is required to progress efficiently.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to reach the goal gem tile ‘+’ while avoiding hazards (primarily spikes), using movement and environmental interactions to create a safe path.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is performed horizontally (left or right), but after each move, gravity automatically carries the player to the next available resting point in the direction of gravity (down or up). Clicks are used to remove breakable (x) tiles to open new paths or fall lines. Hazards like spikes (u/v) instantly end the run if landed on. Undo lets you revert a previous move if a mistake is made. Strategic use of corridor scans and passage detection is required to progress efficiently.
